name: Agent Orchestrator
description: Multi-agent management dashboard for monitoring, configuring, and orchestrating autonomous agent swarms with real-time status and marketplace discovery.

pages.notes: Primary dashboard: swarm canvas shows agent topology with live status; timeline shows recent agent actions and handoffs
Single agent deep-dive: timeline shows execution trace; neural-feedback-loop visualizes decision cycles and confidence
Agent configuration: settings-nav for config sections; form-sections for parameters, prompts, tool assignments
Discover and install agent templates; generative-card-grid renders agent cards with capability tags and ratings

page_briefs.agent-overview: Dense monitoring dashboard. Swarm topology canvas dominates the center showing agent nodes with live status indicators and connection lines. Activity feed timeline in a right sidebar or below, scrolling with timestamped agent actions.
page_briefs.agent-detail: Deep-dive view with agent name and status ring in header. Timeline shows execution trace with expandable entries. Neural feedback loop visualization below with circular confidence diagrams and decision cycle charts.
page_briefs.agent-config: Form-heavy page with grouped settings sections. Toggle switches for boolean config, text inputs for endpoints, dropdown for model selection. Settings nav on the left for jumping between parameter groups.
page_briefs.agent-marketplace: Discovery page with hero banner at top and search bar. Below, a generative card grid of agent templates showing capability tags, ratings, and install buttons on each card.

directives: Header is 52px sticky. Use `d-interactive[data-size=sm]` for all header action buttons (~32px tall, not 40px+).
Hotkey chords (e.g., `g a`) bind keyboard only — never render them as visible nav labels.
Auth bypass for dev: `localStorage.decantr_authenticated = 'true'` gates protected routes. Accept any credentials on the login page and redirect to `/agents`.
Swarm canvas nodes hide minimap + zoom controls below `_mdmax:` (< 768px) and collapse to a vertical status list per the pattern's structured responsive field.

Swarm canvas drag-vs-click threshold: only engage drag once pointermove distance from pointerdown exceeds 4px. Below the threshold, treat as a click (selects the node). Apply `cursor: grab` on node default, `cursor: grabbing` only after drag engages. Without this threshold, every click registers as a drag and selection becomes impossible.

Pan-background applies to canvas BACKGROUND only — not nodes. Nodes get pointerdown/pointermove for drag. Canvas background gets its own pointerdown/pointermove that translates the viewport transform. Wire the two via `e.stopPropagation()` from the node handler so the canvas pan doesn't fire when dragging a node.

shells.sidebar-main: Collapsible sidebar with agent navigation tree and main content area

certification.rationale: Contains dev auth-bypass guidance and must not ship in enterprise artifact sets until rewritten with production-safe auth guidance.
